docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LEE HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG DOMINIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
UNABLE TO SERVE DOMINIC WONG FOR 8-14-92 HRG.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04 TRIAL OF AUG-14-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG DOMINIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG DOMINIC $740.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.38 INTEREST, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $782.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR LEE HENRY ASSIGNED TO DAVID J JOHN, DBA FIRST COURT RECOVERY
